details.test: Task 1: Submit interior painting quote request for 2BR apartment under $2,000
Task 2: Select cheapest interior package with wall repair and book consultation
Task 3: Save three 5-star kitchen testimonials to favorites
Task 4: Create project ideas list with budget kitchen and recent exterior
Task 5: Select zero-VOC washable blue paint and attach to quote
Task 6: Find nearest service team for ZIP 94110 and request on-site visit
Task 7: Generate and save cost estimate for 2 bedrooms + 1 living/dining
Task 8: Save winter exterior painting article and subscribe to seasonal tips
Task 9: Select annual maintenance plan under $400 with annual inspection and configure order
